title: Separator Component
content:
The `Separator` component is a stateless primitive used to separate content visually. It is built upon the `@radix-ui/react-separator` component and provides a customizable way to add horizontal or vertical dividers. ## Key Exports - `Separator`: A React component that renders a separator. ## Props The `Separator` component accepts the following props: - `className`: `string` - Adds custom classes to the separator element. - `orientation`: `'horizontal' | 'vertical'` (default: `'horizontal'`) - Determines the orientation of the separator. - `decorative`: `boolean` (default: `true`) - Indicates if the separator is purely decorative and should be ignored by assistive technologies. - `...props`: Any other valid props for `SeparatorPrimitive.Root`. ## Usage Example ```tsx import { Separator } from '@/components/ui/separator'; function MyComponent() { return (

Content Above

{/* Horizontal separator */}

Content Below

Content Left

{/* Vertical separator */}

Content Right

); } ```
